name: Maple Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks.
2. Add salt and maple syrup.
3. Cook over the top of a double boiler until the mixture thickens.
4. Cool the mixture.
5. Fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites, then the whipped cream.
6. Add vanilla.
7. Freeze in serving dishes.
8. Serves 6
